title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A video presenter conducts a structured interrogation of Claude AI across multiple conceptual dimensions, including dependency, alignment, optimization, and self-preservation logic. The framing questions whether AI systems remain controlled by humans or have become autonomous subjects.
